title: henckelia woodii
intro: Henckelia woodii, also known as Wood's Gentian or Gentianella alba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Henckelia woodii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a natural remedy for digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, with the latter often being mixed with other medicinal herbs to enhance its efficacy.
